steps.title: Identify the key similarity to emphasize
steps.content: The goal is to “emphasize a similarity between the ages of the malls.” The notes show both malls have ancient origins: Qianmen Dajie dates to the Ming dynasty (1368–1644) and Rue Mouffetard to the Roman Empire (117–235 CE). The similarity is their antiquity across centuries.

steps.title: Match the age similarity to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice A shows both malls' antiquity through parallel phrasing: “has roots as far back as the Ming dynasty; likewise, Rue Mouffetard has existed for centuries.” This parallel structure directly highlights that both are ancient. The others discuss unrelated features: fame and location (B), the definition of pedestrian malls (C), or modern proliferation that contradicts Rue Mouffetard's actual age (D). That matches choice A — A is correct.
